input.instructions: Search academic databases, arXiv, and theoretical physics literature for 'Black Hole Classicality' specifically in the context of 'single-photon Hawking radiation'. Identify the three universal dimensionless constants associated with this phenomenon and provide their exact numerical values.

variables.query: three universal dimensionless constants Black Hole Classicality single-photon Hawking radiation
